examples: Arriving in Piazza del Duomo was something incredible.
However, the most impressive feature is obviously the Milan Cathedral or Duomo itself.
On the broad marble steps of the duomo there were scattered groups of beggars and gossiping talkers .
Located on the seventh floor, the eatery has floor-to-ceiling windows with incredible views towards the Duomo.
After an impressive 579 years of construction, the final gate of the Duomo was opened in 1965.
